system.description: Every ending is an exit, and you have no speed limit. When you would like something to be over (a conversation, a relationship, a life) roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
choose a description:
  • Happy Ending
  • Bittersweet Ending
  • Tragedy

The target ends immediately, in the way described, from the target's point of view. The GM decides specifically how.
outcomes.failure: something of yours will end instead. The GM will tell you what it is, and how it does.
outcomes.every3rd3:
choose one additional detail:
  • Delayed: This Ending will occur when you’re gone, and will not be associated with you.
  • Gratuitous: This Ending will revel in its truth. Tragedies will be excruciating, happy endings will be truly joyous. Both will happen over an extended period of time.
  • Meaningful: This Ending will contort itself to leave a lasting impact on the people involved and anyone who views it.
  • Cliffhanger: This Ending will stir curiosity in any witnesses, who may create a legend around it.
